From start to finish, Christian and his team were exceptionally professional, capable, and detail-oriented. He took the time to clearly explain each step of the process and even allowed me to amend the work scope in the contract before starting to ensure everything was done exactly to my liking.

I also appreciated that Christian offered installment-based payments, which gave me peace of mind knowing I could monitor progress and quality throughout the project rather than waiting until the very end to see the results.

Throughout the job, Christian consistently maintained excellent communication—providing updates on what was completed, what remained, and identifying any additional issues as they arose. His proactive approach and transparency made the entire experience stress-free and reassuring.

Like anyone, I was initially cautious when hiring a contractor, but I can confidently say Christian exceeded my expectations. The new membrane looks fantastic and gives me full confidence it will last for many years.

Christian, you have done a stellar job, and I am glad to have hired you! I would highly recommend Bellisimo Contracting to anyone seeking high-quality roofing work.

Reliable, detail orientated and well run.  You hear the comments amongst the team, appreciate the knowledge and see how clean a site is left daily.  When a surprise came up in my siding replacement job, they explained how they would deal with it.  When the time came for settling up, the additional cost was reasonable.  Not only would I recommend this company to anyone, I am bringing them back for a separate job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"May-Jun Simon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8i_Iab95XPZMjer8dsGschnEmFbqS2l_qXD3SpkCcARG4LeDR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give Parliament Contracting 10 stars, I would! They went above and beyond our expectations from start to finish.

What set them apart from other companies was their attention to detail right from the quoting stage — they actually came out to our home to properly assess the siding before providing a quote, something no one else did. That gave us so much confidence that they cared about doing the job right.

Their communication was clear, professional, and incredibly responsive. Every question we had was answered promptly, and they were patient and flexible when we decided to add more work than originally quoted.

Another reason we chose them is because they check all the boxes when it comes to trust and professionalism — fully insured, WSIB coverage, Better Business Bureau accredited, and a strong portfolio of positive references and reviews. That peace of mind really mattered to us.

The crew itself was fantastic: friendly, respectful, and family-friendly (no swearing on site, which we appreciated with kids around). They worked with great care, kept the site tidy, and cleaned up thoroughly afterwards.

The workmanship speaks for itself — quality materials, climate-appropriate methods for Ontario weather, and a passion for ensuring the siding will last 50+ years. Their careful attention to detail shows in every part of the finished project.

Overall, Parliament Contracting combines professionalism, experience (10+ years), and genuine respect for their clients. We couldn’t be happier with the results and highly recommend them to anyone looking for siding work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1gIs7gAwz1by3GVXDp9Ix&fid=0x0:0xba477f71e27708e2"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Kyle Davey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvLHEJVn9QVbyLIEDYWxhC3Ll3BefY8ylCgdEF-XwlobNj0r96=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Solid five stars.
We recently had our old roof replaced and couldn’t be happier with the experience. From start to finish, communication with the company was prompt, clear, and friendly. Every detail was thoroughly explained, so we always knew what to expect.

The pricing was very fair, especially given the high quality of the work. The crew did an excellent job, and their attention to detail really showed—not just in the roofing itself, but also in the clean-up, which was meticulous.

It's clear they take pride in their work. I’ll definitely be recommending them to friends and family!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lee Foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1ujoCnN-nuMHg1_AD5TjtSJqWRWQTjt55Gy137r4-USyR7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tyler and his team are truly the best in Ottawa. With every project, issues arise, Tyler happily made sure everything was completed properly and professionally.  They did not rush.  Very  trustworthy.  After finishing the cleaned up was immaculate! I couldn’t believe my eyes.  Now I just get to enjoy my beautiful home!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Our neighbor recently had their roof done by Remember Me Roofing Company, and one of their crew members, Ben (Benoit), noticed some loose shingles on our roof. He kindly took the initiative to fix them for us at no charge. We were very pleased and impressed by Ben’s thoughtful gesture and offered him a small payment for his help, which he graciously declined. It’s rare to see such hardworking, honest, and helpful workers these days. Well done, Ben! Keep up the great work!  Helene and Des","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDl6Vy3xT5b1CWwV0UhKecS&fid=0x0:0xa3fbcea5c9fb1636"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Philipp Melbinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX69FRCK09EHtX0hAkwuuc1YPDKEivFQXt3xO6plBX6CxjafDdS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Roofing Company - highly recommend them!
I recently hired remember me roofing to replace my roof. I had a fantastic experience from start to finish and can only highly recommend them. They immediately got in touch when I requested a quote and set everything up shortly thereafter. Jordan (the sales rep on my case) came over and was very well prepared with imaging, suggestions, samples and all sorts of information. I originally was thinking about a steel roof, but decided to go with architectural shingles (I live in a middle unit townhome). Jordan gave his honest feedback according to my needs and future plans with the property and I cannot appreciate the honest feedback he provided enough (which seems to become a rarer and rarer quality these days as extra bucks are preferred over long-term relationships). Once the shingle was chosen our dedicated project manager Jesse took over. He did an excellent job managing every aspect from start to finish keeping us posted along the way. Last but not least I must thank John and his crew. They all were excellent from the get-go and did a fantastic job. They were very friendly and professional. They not only did a great job on the roof, but also all other aspects including clean-up and so forth. they finished late in the evening and even took the time to come back during their lunch break the following day to make sure no roofing nails etc. were lying around because by the end there was no daylight left. I can only praise Remember Roofing and will def hire them again should i have roofing needs in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJB-UpGomcIgTdeXIAGSjqUqELVU5OmyqVBwaSbQfOJNof6bQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Remember Me Roofing employees are very professional, they made the entire process/experience great. Thank you Remember Me Roofing team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ravi Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0WAf4SaFPT1nVGeZHXixcsN5nG7fdAMwdaLB6IfB9_rNclpep=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the back side of my house roof replaced by Remember Me Roofing, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Rusty was incredibly helpful in providing fair and transparent quotes, answering all my questions, and getting the work scheduled as quickly as possible. I truly appreciated his professionalism and prompt communication.

Ben, who came to do the actual roof replacement, did a wonderful job. He was very polite, hardworking, and meticulous, taking his time to ensure everything was done perfectly. The quality of his workmanship really shows, and the finished result looks fantastic.

Thank you, Remember Me Roofing, Rusty, and Ben, for your excellent service! I would highly recommend this company to anyone looking for a reliable and professional roofing contractor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Donna Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZgeHHa_Eh9asnHMwaeNLwvPD5N9cNBkuKAnlPLUsCgLgI_ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Notified in advance of date they would install new eavestrough on front of house, arrived on time, friendly knock on door to explain plan for day,  efficient, friendly and worked well as a team. Thank you RememberMe Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Coulas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyhwmOFMcjefVAdU1RqRdLoVDt-2T4U1hBgwyfX5kgxbGtxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Remember Me did my townhouse roof this week and did a great job!  2 days and a bit of a 3rd from start to finish.  They cleaned everything up including some debris that made it's way onto the deck at the back of the house without any prompting to do so.  The crew were professional and friendly, even going so far as to remove a satellite dish and secure some loose window flashing I could not get to otherwise.  Make sure you ask for ask for Jesse Bergeron when it's time to do your roof!  Ken Glofcheskie was the sales rep I dealt with also and he was fast with clear responses and courteous as well, all around good company to deal with!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gary Madore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJfMoYK0jENsTvTodXJgAbri8ZKk1_XP4f2IC3US9tb7YBiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had booked an appointment for Remember Me Roofing to install exhaust vents and connect ducting for two recently installed bathroom fans. I will definitely give them my future business.","Images":null,"When":""}]

During the quote process from companies, Stewart Roofing was the only company that used a ladder and went up onto the roof to assess for the quote.
On the day of the installation, the worker found an issue that was explained concisely. This is when most other companies would know they have you in a corner and raise the quote drastically, but an adjustment was very fair for the required additional work.
The finished product looks great, a well-done job.
All the workers were kind and respectful to me and my property.
Also, how often do you get to speak with the owner? At every stage, Stan responded very quickly to my email or phone calls. A strong personal touch.
I will emphatically refer Stewart Roofing to family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul McAllister","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMXDT4fWA1rATLV0AJrmw8WV2zAWvmJCFF9Zrxxys1iHk_5vtO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent roof repair, Stewart Roofing are the pros!

Denis from Stewart Roofing repaired my roof leak which occurred where the roof met a wall in two locations.  His work was performed efficiently over two days and consisted of removing the lower 2 pieces of cedar siding to expose the wall, and also removing the flashing, shingles close to the wall, as well as step flashing.

Denis then installed a waterproof membrane on the edge of the roof deck and lower wall, new step flashing, shingles (to replace the ones that he removed) and also new wall flashing, which looks great.  The roof looks better now than it did before he started, as he finished it with a nice brown-coloured flashing with a J-trim to make the cut siding look neat and tidy.

The debris was cleaned up on both days and I felt that Stewart Roofing respected my property.  Denis gave me some good advice regarding the prevention of ice damming, which I plan on following.  He also moved a down-spout at my request to allow me to more easily remove ice from that area of the roof.

When having a new roof installed, be sure to have new step flashing and wall flashing installed at the same time to avoid leaks in the future.  I learned the hard way about this, but thanks to Stewart Roofing, I now feel less anxious when stormy weather approaches and am looking forward to testing next Spring’s ice melt to truly test the roof and flashing.

I would definitely recommend Stewart Roofing to anyone looking to have a new roofing system installed, or for leak repairs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICU2oyJaA&fid=0x0:0xc5e3ea63581b100d"],"When":"2019-7-21"},{"Name":"Robert Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdpeiRLy4zaI6Qme96shkiUvv8poADyAdEdGULAtO5j-EGWwUoSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stewart Roofing replaced our old roof tiles with OwensCorning tiles this spring.

We were very happy with their service.  They were on time, did a great job, and the crew were friendly and considerate.  And the new OwensCorning tiles come with a great, transferable warranty.

We highly recommend Stewart Roofing.  A+","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICq57uo2AE&fid=0x0:0xc5e3ea63581b100d"],"When":"2021-6-21"},{"Name":"Bersabel ephrem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmnzfGIgMsmL3F44T443AKsSjo-07HjCUakT5pB0oi0oZKXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so pleased to provide this recommendation to Stewart Roofing.  I recently had an urgent issue that needed to be addressed related to a leak in my living area.  It involved a deck and a flat roof.  The issue was a bit complicated.  I had reached out to a number of roof companies but one stood out for its professionalism, exceptional communication skills, superior understanding of the issue and knowledge of what needs to be done and for an overall sense of sincerity. Steward Roofing did a fantastic job and completed the work on time! Throughout the process, Mr. Stewart explained each step to me, ensured that I was aware of any unexpected development and adjustment that needed to be made. He was respectful, honest and conscientious.   His team was also exceptional and very  professional.  I highly recommend Stewart Roofing for anyone who is looking for a quality service  provider with professional and personal integrity!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Les Corrigan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbLHQCqbCDJpZ-Yk5Gv4uACamcX-xcwsjF0EeUatRV397T0gZM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top notch quality and installation. I have recommend Stewart Roofing Ottawa to many friends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEhe7_7AE&fid=0x0:0xc5e3ea63581b100d"],"When":"2018-3-5"},{"Name":"Joan Bickerton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-3gnNtNXWavVxXY1Kva-i8Jf6YO_r0zaNAp87WNdsu7aSgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience with Stewart roofing and his professional team did excellent work. Out of nowhere, Mike stopped. No hesitation. No questions. Just pure kindness. Two of his employees immediately jumped in to help as well. They were very responsive to calls and emails and completed the job when they said they would. Great workmanship and a good extended warranty. We’d definitely recommend this company to others","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Bonacci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrBEYxHHh1IzC4N3Pfwox7V8DaCSz0oaJuX9mwH_7bNbhygrCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'd like to start by commending the exceptional customer service provided by Berube.  I'm sure I must have had a hundred questions and changed my mind on things a few times.  The moment I reached out with inquiries, they were prompt and attentive addressing all of my questions and concerns.

Additionally, the quality of work delivered on my roof was outstanding.  What a difference it made on the appearance of my house!  They took extra precautions to make sure all materials were cleaned up before they left, leaving no debris or nails behind.  All of the work was done on-time and within budget.

What I liked as well is that the roof comes with a fantastic warranty, giving me peace of mind.

Thank you Berube Roofing for a job well done and for going above and beyond to ensure customer satisfaction.

Ryan","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Frank Beaulieu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRF51DkYbdg0GepiVe5B__8sPwVeGPv7fNKjkypUzvgpQPYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have used Berube Roofing on many occasions. They have done work on my home, and on several neighbours roofs as well. I am also in the trades and work for a renovation/ restoration company. We have used several different roofing companies over the years, in my opinion Berube is the best. They are very good at what they do. They are more than competitive with the pricing. They are courteous, punctual, tidy, hard working people. I highly recommend them. Keep up the good work guys and girls.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen Balser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzb6n2Fw0mgJI2MbMYxS2kaBespOwIoa_UbvD3ynxnpZ3rXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a maintenance supervisor for 144 units and there is always something that needs to be replaced or fixed on our property. I met Jeremy Berube who owns Berube Roofing back in the fall of 2022 after the Der-echo Tornadoes.Two tornadoes hit our property at the same time. We had considerable siding damage that needed to be fixed. I had a hard time finding contractors to do the repair work since it was late fall.
Jeremy from Berube roofing came out and although snow was just a week away, Jeremy and his crew arrived and went out of their way to repair some 10 units that needed to be repaired so the  exterior walls would survive the winter winds. I think they even worked in the snow. I was impressed.
Since then, I have used Berube Roofing to replace the roofing on two-unit sections of 12 homes. Jeremy went out of his way to also go inside the attic of the units before he started the job. He found several big pieces of sub layer missing and even a couple of support beams in the rafters that were dangerous that needed to be shored up.
This roof was repaired in 2018,(before my time) but like allot of fly by night roofers, that company was no longer in business.

What really sold me on using Berube Roofing is the incredible warranty. Only a very few reputable roofers qualify to offer this. Jeremy explained that this warranty add-on comes with his service for the low cost of about a skid of shingles. I have peace of mind that our condominium may save thousands if work is needed, knowing that their warranty agreement is permanently in place for the duration of the warranty and a roofing company always be available.
Jeremy and his crew are excellent workers, and their workmanship is high quality. I know this because in my younger days I did roofing for a couple of years.
They also communicate and inform the homeowner with regular updates and timelines which is very important since the replacement of a roof effects 6 to 8 homeowners.
His company also does very good brick work, they worked on a number of brick replacement and pointing jobs for my units, and the workmanship was excellent. Good to know if you need chimney repairs.
From the  ground up, walls to roof, I highly recommend using Berube Roofing. Thanks Jeremy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guy Landry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW79eTkvV4HIxYwSLG7q1v2OB3E9HYUdIoQHMjvhC4E30v4PySr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hi.  Berube Roofing did my roof a few weeks ago and did an amazing job.  The crew worked two long days to get the job done on time and on budget.  It was a great experience.

The best thing is that they provide a warranty directly from the manufacturer.  Not many roofers provide this level of guarantee.

And their price was on par with competitors.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKume_l4-_2EPtBaNi0L-5CFwpt8DgC60kXdMNw4Yfik57A0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofing work was performed on time and as contracted at competitive price.  Good clean up afterwards.  Eavesthrough was installed later as agreed.  Very responsive when we had questions or required  changes.  Roof looks good.  We were happy overall.  We would recommend.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Holly & Max Bair-Marshall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnRzApB7Z_Yqm3GOQytH-FurdwK_-Lk5cIPcJBc1TWL7SyTA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great experience with Roofmaster and would highly recommend them. Our project manager, Roger, was communicative and helpful, and the whole process was transparent and easy. We have a flat roof and they did a great job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristopher Nunn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFd0tbDVjt6rIGG3wjvEJSfS66VxYtgP6V7sFgxFox2kVnDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"*** Edit, First things first, I don't yell and I don't berate...I've not had any other issues with other contractors and I have dealt with many and in fact, when things are done right I write good reviews as you can see in my history. This response isn't surprising and is actually consistent with the same communication I have received from the owner over text. Kershan has done a great job of massaging the facts to suit the company's narrative. It's unfortunate that telling the truth becomes online smearing but this is consistent with the other responses the owner has provided to reviews, always someone else's fault ***

Customer Service is appalling from the front line all the way up to the owners! We had some work done in the past on our roof where they installed maxivents and we were happy with what was done. We had further issues with our dryer vent on the side of the home (it was damaged). We called Roofmaster and they were able to come and replace it quite quickly (we were happy with how fast it was done). The problem started with when they replaced it. The door on the vent stayed in an open position. We knew it was a problem when we asked the people cleaning the dryer vent to close the flap, then used the dryer again and it stayed in an open position. We emailed Roofmaster to let them know there was a problem and ended up speaking with Lisa who proceeded to tell me the dryer vent was installed in the wrong place and should have been installed on the roof (even though every builder puts it on the side and there is tons of information suggesting you should never put it on the roof. She then offered an option where they could install it on the roof instead. When I explained that didn't solve the problem of my not getting what I paid for I was contacted by Kershan Bulsara who stated he was an owner of their small business and asked me to send pictures. I did and he came out and fixed it. It worked find for a couple of weeks until I found the flap on the ground beside my house. Evidently he must have bent it to get it to flap and the wind must have knocked it off. I noticed this on Friday March 1 and sent him a picture, I didn't expect an immediate response and advised I would send him another picture when it was light (since it was dark on Friday). What happened next floored me and turned me right off his company. I sent a picture of the open dryer vent on Saturday (again not expecting a response until Monday) and he texted back "please do not text me in the weekend. You will be responded to on Monday when we reopen". Understand that this guy gave me his cell number initially and never provided any restrictions and asked me to text him the original pictures instead of emailing. I have been in customer service for over 20 years and this is exactly what you don't do. I have been patient, I've only asked for what I paid for and this is how I get treated? If the job was done right the first time I wouldn't have to go through this. He offered to refund me for the job but truth be told I just want to share my experience, I don't want a refund that comes with strings. $480.25 to install a dryer vent. Seems simple right? Now I have to hire another company to fix what Roofmaster wouldn't. Oh and Kershan, your customer service is appalling. Stay away from these guys. I will be sharing my experience with anyone who wants any roof work done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9tNKJVg&fid=0x0:0x1e97be7322187572"],"When":"2024-3-3"},{"Name":"Sudershan Manhas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjxyfd-eVmB7rrg2q_jbPlJYCasrR-qZTQTztPl01QTePZag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofmaster did an amazing job for my roof. They were very thorough with the work and were very helpful in explaining all the issues regarding the roof. Appreciated their willingness to help me walk through the process.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tyler Vergette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZZfQJ8Ptz3iwIsUlNtdl2Mie6-Rd4FsTB03rO5nJ2DMVx1g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Roofmaster to install a new chimney cap at my house, and I would highly recommend this company! They are very thorough and professional! The workmanship was top notch, and I will definitely be hiring this company for any of my roofing needs going forward!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Belaineh Deguefé","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0Z_2S5_o9vHsRc8T04JPkl9Ltd6KpKlngoVIWkutoSKOTDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Due to the age and condition of our roof, we needed a roofing company to completely replace our roof. We have benefited from the services of Roger Lauzon on behalf of Roofmaster over the last twenty years and retained him to advise us and lead the project.

The work was challenging as the weather in Ottawa has become increasingly unpredictable and the job entailed removing everything down to drywall. The project also involved scheduling the contribution of two companies providing spray insulation and electrical services.

The work performed by Roger Lauzon and his team was excellent.  In addition to rebuilding the roof they also took steps to protect the house when there was a threat of rain.  The job was finished on time.  Throughout Roger shared pictures of the progress of his work, answered our questions, raised issues we had not thought of, and deployed a great sense of humour!

We highly recommend their services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angela Griese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV-o-AXR1TJOsrx9hcCdMqiMsCo3LcaYacoLXXuFfCv5KhUhI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Roofmaster, it was a great experience .  From the first email with a quick response and date booked to repair shingles . Eric from Roofmasters not only came and fixed my shingles, but also took the time to explain and inspect a possible leak with detailed photos. He also went above and beyond letting my neighbour know he had items left on his roof and the repairs from another company were not finished. I will always call and refer your company. Thank you again for the great service and peace of mind.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Irma Wells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITgf2qeg531mjnSVfm9o1wx5ACLMgas99Vk7p7EuL8UF33pg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofmaster recently installed new shingles and snow guards on my residence. At the outset I received excellent advice on product selection and assistance in getting the project underway. Installation was truly professional, completed within two days, clean up was thorough. Overall a clear 10 out of 10 worthy of a high recommendation. My appreciation to Alberto and his team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Calvert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTCPu-3Pb-muLy1VDcf3Qt76kWU8eDI50r2fmvB-VNFkq40lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofmaster did a great job replacing the roof of our century home a few years ago. They arrived on time, completed the job in one day as planned, cleaned up the work site and left everything in great shape. They easily handled complications such as failing roof deck boards and wasps nests in the soffit cavity. When a couple of shingles came loose in a wind storm a couple of years later, they promptly replaced them free of charge under warranty; they didn't claim extraordinary weather voided the warranty. I would definitely recommend them for any residential roof replacement.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The front man and crew were professional and courteous.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVU9nKTwIFeqCPM63prKHiVEE6HVIqCZ78a3HqUn1fuypzoB8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"***IMPORTANT READ & IN RESPONSE TO THE OWNER’S COMMENT***

Unfortunately, my experience with this company was far from what I expected. There were ongoing communication issues, delays, and the quality of work was below standard.

I recommend that anyone considering this company take the time to do thorough research, ask for references, and explore other options before making a commitment. Looking back, I wish I had done more due diligence myself.

In my experience, a reputable and trustworthy company typically doesn’t need to rely on door-to-door flyer distribution to attract customers — it’s often a red flag worth noting.

MY RESPONSE TO THE OWNER’S COMMENT:

This review reflects my genuine experience as a customer. I chose to use a nickname for privacy, which is common on public platforms.
Dismissing feedback by accusing a reviewer of fraud or being a competitor, rather than addressing the concerns raised, speaks for itself. I did not reach out further, as I hired a licensed contractor to complete the work to a satisfactory and safe standard. My intent was simply to share my experience so others can make an informed decision. I have nothing further to add.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Veronique Gregoire","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvOa3dY9mmga8HRAgNMqTPzSdZFLgQoMUnnCQyK6zWpKS1tvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If there was an option for 0 stars i would do so. My mother in law got a flyer and called them to redoe her whole kitchen cabinets, walls, ceiling fixed and flooring. The contract was signed on March 2024 and they took a bunch of money and didnt start the renovations until May 2024, everytime they had excuses that cabinets are back order, then counter is backorder. Floors, walls, celling, lighting is finally done, cabinets finally installed quite a few gaps in cabinet installation, ceramic has bumps, missing grout, wall baseboards cordoron is not straight around the corner. We’ve called several times, they are extremely rude very unprofessional, they schedule apnts, no call no show,  they took over 32,000$ so far, and to this day we are now in Nov almost Dec 2024 and still not done, counter is a piece of plywood temporarily with a cheap one sink because apparently it was back ordered. When asked them to correct all imperfections before final payments was threatened with a construction lien. They finally dropped off the counter and demanding another 1000$ to do the installation, we refuse to pay the 1000$ until they fix what needs to done so now counter is not installed. Also theres an open hole for a oven range fan but not done and no fan which is also on the contract. They also painted just with a primer, Cheap material, laminate counters not impressed for that kind of money. They took advantage of my senior immigrant mother in a law. Now we contacted lawyers stay tuned. Pls stay away from this company. All they want is your money but dont do the job. STAY AWAY. As you can see as per pictures, ceramic is cracked, missing some cuboards facing, open wires sticking out of the walls, incomplete project and they already took all her money 32,000$. Its given this company makes no money and verry unprofessional, no experience. My poor mother in law was ripped off, so sad. If you do your research online they barely have a portfolio of there work. Do not hire these people. They are not to be trusted. If anyone has had the same horrible experience with this company pls reach out so we can inform the lawyer.

Wow  i cant beleive the lies. this company’s family was never threathen, we dont even know there names. Police were never called lmao.  Unbelievable no accountability whatsoever. Pics do not lie. Will show the horrible work, btw we are still missing pieces of the cubboards. Lawyer is now informed. Paid 32 000$ and pieces still missing with open wall and electrical wires coming out.  Always Demanded to be paid in cash, didnt not want cheques because apparently there banks take too long to cash, talking about unstrustworthy boot leg company. Who’s the criminal?????","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvj8PlxgE&fid=0x0:0x7af0eb8774aa8e67"],"When":"2024-12-15"},{"Name":"Dan Closs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtXAqgjAle-KFarD9bdKNY9uLC8LCrXR34FcghafGBu65km5Wi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have used Monaco the last two summers and the results have been fantastic.  My deck was demolished & rebuilt and this year my window wells were rebuilt and a window was replaced.  Everything was on time and on budget with no issues throughout.  Respectful, knowledgeable and professional...what more can you ask for!  Thanks again Monaco!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gregory Kovacs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyQUohmC9JytPNYiJBELzN3r3tlMyDH8RMOFqsBKn8x6e07eU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had what, I think, most would consider a “mostly minor” foundation issue.  Our house is 40+ years old.  The house had a foundation “crack” when it was built.  They had what I think was a reasonably professional “crew” repair that crack when the house was built with what would have been the “methodology and tech of that time period.”  It’s a large basement.  We also have a greenhouse attached to the rest of the house via a “shared roofline.”  The “main crack” from the house’s original construction had begun leaking very small amounts of water years ago during heavy rains and, over the following years, began to leak “slightly more water.”  We also had a minor leak coming from a “45 degree turn” which is near where our greenhouse is situated.  I mention this detail seeing as the main orientation of the job was “foundation work” and it’s not automatically “redundant” to mention the seriousness of “one crack vs another.”  We have had rain and “monsoon rain” a “good deal and a good amount” over several years now.  We had a day where the window well in question, which is above the main crack, would not drain its water during a “monsoon level” rain.  We have, usually, one rainfall like that a year.  It leaked a lot and it was also coming in through the window because the window well, itself, was not draining.
Contact Monaco via a “flyer in the mail.” Business dealings go fine.  I didn’t write anything down.  Remember them saying something about contacting us at the end of a certain month.  I phone to touch base at “end of month.”  Can’t remember if I get a call back the same day or the next day.  Job starts.  I’ve worked in heavy industry or what some might call a “perfect blend” of heavy industry and construction.  Meaning more like a “perfect storm” and sometimes a “perfect meme.”  Not at any executive capacity or anything “that serious.”  I’m used to not just the “good and the bad” stories but something more like “every” story.  We’ve had a “variety” of contractors and businesses work on the house over the years.  They end up digging the holes by hand.  It’s foundation work.  We decide to do all of the 3 window wells around the main crack and have a hole dug into the corner area of the greenhouse as per the original business conversations.  The purpose is to redo and check each weeping tile “area” as well as fix and deal with the 2 cracks. I observe that our greenhouse foundation was originally well designed.  I can say that that some people that work at Monaco have extensive foundation work and experience.  I don’t work in that “field.”
We have a very, very large garden.  Throughout the entire “job,” they stuck to the schedule they originally set out and addressed us with.  They didn’t use any of our washrooms.  They didn’t seem to have to bother us much, outside of regular financial checkups.  Albeit, we are addressing them and checking up with them.  They dug up some of the garden plants as a “gardener would ask.” They didn’t seem to leave much garbage at all anywhere.  One cup every second day and it was usually somewhere sensibly placed.  In our case, they left the work tidied up, relative to the job, at the end of every single day.  They also stuck to “their own” schedule, as well as ours.  30 degrees+.  “Monsoon” rain on the very weekend that arrived during the middle of the job.  There are “several redeeming" moments coming from varying employees, etc.  "Someone in the company reduces my stress in some reasonable way."  There are other people in the household.  This review does not contain a factor such as: “We were not at home and communicated to Monaco via office2office phone/email.”  Patch work, on the foundation walls, was done well.  The coverings were done well.  Maybe very well. I don’t do this for a living, etc.  I’m am a “neat freak,” at the core.  They did everything they said they would do.  They reseeded the grass and they rebuilt the “stonework” that was a part of the greenhouse area dig.  We very well might have a follow up with some additional stonework within the “near future.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL-b386gE&fid=0x0:0x7af0eb8774aa8e67"],"When":"2024-6-21"},{"Name":"Chantal Monette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_726Wl8mDsGj7Upj-KPkHexrv6F_C5axjleXN1kFvaVxxZZY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had our bathroom renovated by Monaco Construction and couldn’t be happier with the results. The team was professional, efficient, and delivered high-quality work from start to finish. Every detail was handled with care, and the final result are fabulous .We highly recommend Monaco Construction to anyone looking for reliable, top-notch renovation work!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I highly recommend Firon Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Goran Pop-Jordanov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk0YYf-hr4977UMpYH-YHVskWNPEHgv-cgKZTx3XuCNGE62qzv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My dealing with Firon Roofing had started as I needed a quick estimate after a home inspector found some deficiències on a home we were about to buy. They provided exactly what was need to support our negotiations with the house seller.
Few months later, the deal on the house was finally closed. It was already mid autumn, so timely action was needed in order to finish before the winter season, to prevent possible leakages and further damage. The estimator came and did thorough investigation of the roof inside out. The numbers were presented on the spot and the course of further action was discussed.
Two weeks later, everything was ready for the job to be done. The crew of 5, came 7:30 in the morning, and by 1 pm they were gone. They replaced the half of the roof shingles, put new attic vents, and replaced 2 skylight windows.
I wish, all tradesman were like this!
Thank you, Firon Roofing, you were there to help us when we were in need.
Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Macilroy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIV5s1VEijL-hIfSL82CKCDq1hbyOUc_whERFfL0hdPq3GqMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No other roofing company in Ottawa would help me with my blocked exhaust pipe on roof, due to it being a three storey. [{"Name":"paul bernier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZfTjdnKH_RGhxBexgPDbmugfssVQwwoZUdGsSQUoeXZoMqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had several small slow leaks on either side of a third-storey  dormer on a fairly steeply pitched roof. These had stumped the previous roofer who was only able to effect a temporary fix by applying membrane material over two large areas. This had been in place for months until we hired Jack upon the enthusiastic recommendation of friends, and after considering and receiving quotes from other roofers.

Jack was thorough in his analysis of the source of the problem and alternative approaches for solving it. Throughout, we were confident that Jack had a sound understanding of what was needed. It  was easy to review and discuss alternative solutions with him. His manner was thoughtful, competent and cooperative. He was pleasant to deal with from beginning to end. He and his team delivered quality work, at a fair price, within the expected timeframe without the delays we have experienced in the past with most other roofers.

The roof access was far from easy, given the close proximity to the neighbours' house, and the problem solving was not straightforward because of the manner in which the dormer flashing had been installed originally. He  showed professionalism and skill in addressing the challenge of installing and working from scaffolding in the narrow space between our house and the neighbours'. We were very satisfied with the entire process and the end result. We have no hesitation in recommending him.

Paul & Maureen Bernier","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Riley Draward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy8OfUHyr7yDPF9D3hFukbLADlqAhrJlQ7W-FBdZMcgEmODr6E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a small roof leak and Jack was able to come over that day and take a look.
